summary: Implementation review accepts Harbor validation runtime facts and private/redacted evidence policy fields as bounded Stage 5 refs/status truth.
reviewed_validation_summary: pnpm typecheck; pnpm test; pnpm smoke:runtime; git diff --check passed locally on HARBOR-115.

semantic_review_disposition.reason: The change exposes refs and status facts only, with process-memory private capture markers and redacted export boundary fields; it does not expose raw DOM, raw network, cookies, tokens, profile storage, real profiles, hosted browser, or Stage 6 behavior.

implementation_review_disposition.reason: Typecheck, tests, runtime smoke, diff check, suite, carrier, fact-chain, and verify passed for the bounded Runtime API fixture changes.
